Document:
# Play antagonists responsibly Do not take or enable antagonist roles that you do not want to play. Solo antagonists and team antagonists are intended to cause issues for non-antagonists or the station. Antagonists are not required to exclusively cause issues, but their net impact on non-antagonists or the station should generally be negative.
## Don't cause excessive destruction beyond your objectives This rule is not intended to disallow reasonable steps taken to complete your objectives. As an antagonist, you can always kill in bona fide self defense, or if the action of killing could potentially advance your objectives. Taking steps to permanently round remove many people who are not a threat to you is almost always excessive.
Unless told otherwise, antags should avoid causing disruption that could cause entire departments to stop functioning, either permanently or for a significant portion of the round. Antagonists should also avoid round-removing a large number of players unnecessarily.
Antagonists should avoid specifically targeting arrivals and cryosleep. Antagonists should avoid antagonistic behaviour on the evacuation shuttle, unless it is required for self defense or is absolutely necessary.
## Exemptions The Syndicate Agent "die a glorious death" objective allows antagonists to ignore the excessive-destruction restriction entirely. Nuclear Operatives, Wizards, and Zombies are also exempt from it.
